runners.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 450m at Warrnambool. Draws the cherry but has the job ahead.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 450m at Warrnambool. Draws the cherry but has the job ahead.

runners.formComment: Inside draw could be an advantage. Last start finished sixth on April 10 over 450m at Shepparton behind Soda Swan, beaten 7 lengths (26.25) in a T3 RSTW. Happy enough to dismiss in this field.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Inside draw could be an advantage. Last start finished sixth on April 10 over 450m at Shepparton behind Soda Swan, beaten 7 lengths (26.25) in a T3 RSTW. Happy enough to dismiss in this field.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Went up with lids at box rise and slow to begin.

runners.formComment: Last start finished 3rd in a T3 Grade 6 on April 10 over 390m at Shepparton behind Aston Pluto beaten 5 lengths (22.80). Thereabouts of late and rates highly this line-up. Expected to be in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Had been racing in honest fashion, recording three placings in a row, before finishing fourth (25.95) at this track last start. Boxed awkwardly and needs to bounce back.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Backs up after finishing 6th on April 8 over 390m at this track in a T3 RSTW. Not among the main chances this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing 6th on April 8 over 390m at this track in a T3 RSTW. Not among the main chances this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Turned head outwards approaching winning post.

runners.formComment: Was out of placings last time (26.08) at Shepparton in a Grade 5, finishing fourth and beaten 4.5 lengths. Has three placings from four starts from the draw. Looks a leading chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Marred turning into home straight.

runners.formComment: Showed brilliant pace early and gave a sight when a half a length third over 300m Healesville in 17.15. Solid chance with even luck.
